name: Cream of Shittake Mushroom Soup
recipeIngredient: 2 tablespoons toasted sesame seeds, crushed in blender
recipeInstructions:
1. In a small sauté pan, sauté mushrooms and onions in half of the butter for 5 minutes.
2. Combine the stocks in a 3-quart pot over medium heat.
3. Add cooked mushrooms and onion to the stock.
4. Melt remaining butter in a saucepan and add crushed sesame seeds.
5. Gradually add 1/4 cup of stock to the sesame seeds while stirring continuously.
6. Add sesame mixture to the warming stock.
7. Add salt. Cook over low heat for 10 minutes.
8. Cool broth before adding cream to prevent curdling.
9. After adding cream, stir until well blended.
10. Heat thoroughly but do not boil, as separation may occur.
11. Serve in cups and garnish with chives.
